message:
update(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.5 -> 0.2.9; refactor triage variable names for clarity

Dependency updates:
- Cargo.toml: bump asupersync from 0.2.5 to 0.2.9 (default-features = false,
  optional)
- Cargo.lock: asupersync 0.2.6 -> 0.2.9 along with its franken-* family
  (franken-decision, franken-evidence, franken-kernel all 0.2.6 -> 0.2.9)
- New transitive dependencies pulled in by asupersync 0.2.9:
  crossbeam-deque, futures-lite 2.6.1, futures-core/io/task/util 0.3.32,
  parking 2.2.1, wasm-bindgen-futures 0.4.58, signal-hook 0.3.18,
  hashbrown 0.15.5 now depends on allocator-api2 + equivalent,
  getrandom 0.4.1 now depends on js-sys + wasm-bindgen (WASM support)

Triage scoring readability improvements (src/analysis/triage.rs):
- Rename abbreviated local variables to descriptive names in
  compute_impact_score():
  - br_raw -> blocker_ratio_raw
  - br_norm -> blocker_ratio_norm
  - w_br -> weight_blocker_ratio
  - w_st -> weight_staleness
  - w_pb -> weight_priority_boost
- Reformat w_sum calculation from single long line to multi-line
  expression for readability
- All ScoreComponent struct literals updated to reference the new
  variable names (BlockerRatio, Staleness, PriorityBoost components)
- Pure rename/reformat — no behavioral changes to scoring logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
